title: Xerophilous Uruguayan Grape Nut Cereal Pilaf
description: A unique, macrobiotic-friendly one-pot dish featuring Grape Nut cereal, typically served as a springy breakfast.
instructions: In a claypot, cook 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add 1 small onion, finely chopped, and cook until translucent.
Add 2 cloves of garlic, minced, and cook for 1 minute more.
Incorporate 1 cup of Grape Nut cereal, stirring to coat with oil.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
